title: onobrychis prostrata
intro: Onobrychis prostrata, also known as creeping bird's foot, is a perennial plant native to Central Asia and Eastern Europe. It belongs to the legume family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis prostrata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
